action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "Excellent! I've created the essential device nodes (console, null, tty). Now I need to create the init script that will be the first process to run. This script will mount necessary filesystems and spawn a shell.",
  "plan": "I'll create the init script that will: 1) Mount proc and sys filesystems, 2) Set up the environment, 3) Spawn a shell. The script should be simple but functional for booting into a root shell.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > init << 'EOF'
#!/bin/sh

# Mount essential filesystems
/bin/mount -t proc none /proc
/bin/mount -t sysfs none /sys

# Create device nodes if they don't exist
[ -e /dev/console ] || /bin/mknod /dev/console c 5 1
[ -e /dev/null ] || /bin/mknod /dev/null c 1 3
[ -e /dev/tty ] || /bin/mknod /dev/tty c 5 0

# Set up hostname
/bin/hostname localhost

# Clear the screen
clear

echo "Welcome to Linux!"
echo "Kernel booted successfully."
echo ""
echo "Starting shell..."

# Start a shell
/bin/sh
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
